app.script:
df <- get.input()
fit <- lm(force_N ~ 0 + extension_m, data = df)
plot(df$extension_m, df$force_N,
  pch = 19, col = "sienna", cex = 1.6,
  xlab = "extension_m", ylab = "force_N",
  main = "Hooke's Law"
)
arrows(df$extension_m, df$force_N - df$force_err_N,
  df$extension_m, df$force_N + df$force_err_N,
  angle = 90, code = 3, length = 0.05
)
abline(a = 0, b = coef(fit)[1], col = "navy", lwd = 2)
cat(sprintf("Estimated spring constant: %.1f N/m\n", coef(fit)[1]))

ui.sheetStatus: フックの法則サンプル
